title: 4 Concrete & Aggregates Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Headwinds
text: Federal infrastructure spending should help the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry players to thrive. VMC, MLM, EXP and SUM should gain from a demand surge amid high costs.

title: These Were The Five Best And Worst Performing Basic Materials Stocks In October 2022
text: Basic materials, such as metal, concrete and chemicals, form the backbone of the global economy because every sector requires basic materials.

title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Vulcan Materials' (VMC) third-quarter results reflect strong demand and a positive pricing environment amid inflation.

title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Vulcan (VMC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.09% and 4.45%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
